scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location apps/api; if (Test-Path ../../.venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe) { ../../.venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe main:app --reload --port 8000 } else { python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 }"
